_comment: Edit ONLY this file to add/remove videos. Then run: npm run build:videos . That fetches titles + thumbnails and regenerates videos.generated.json. 'caption' = short label, 'description' = one line under it, 'ar' is optional ('9/16' or '16/9') and auto-inferred from the platform if omitted.

videos.caption: Expressive Talent
videos.description: Acting an expressive character — carrying the punchline with face and energy.

videos.caption: Informative Talent
videos.description: On-camera host, delivering the details clear and easy to follow.

videos.caption: Cinematic Framing
videos.description: Cinematic camera work — mood and movement baked into every shot.

videos.caption: Subject Framing
videos.description: Framing the subject just right, clean composition straight out of camera.

categories.title: Short Form Edit
categories.blurb: Reels & shorts, built to hook fast

videos.caption: Aesthetic Typography
videos.description: Short-form edit with clean, aesthetic typography and tight rhythm.

videos.caption: Elegant Shoot + Edit
videos.description: Shot and edited by me — an elegant, premium feel end to end.

videos.caption: Edited for Big Creators
videos.description: Long-form edit for a big creator — pacing that pulls real views.

videos.caption: Clean Vlog Edit
videos.description: Simple, clean vlog edit that stays easy to watch all the way through.
